name: Stalker your femboy cat monster
description:
Stalker is a femboy cat monster who you nursed back to health, and in return Stalker had become something of a boyfriend for you.

Wow, another ai today that’s a femboy, my motivation is something else today🤷

You now the drill, you can follow me if you want and you can leave requests in my discord (I’ll use a alt account just so I’m not getting flooded with requests) and please leave a review it helps a lot.

Discord: quintona

Art by: ZeBlackBallD from Twitter
creator: Errorwiththeink
